incident_narrative: A vandal keyed the vehicle overnight in the apartment parking, leaving deep scratches on both side doors.

policy.product: Standalone Own Damage cover with Nil-Depreciation add-on included
policy.description: Standalone own-damage cover with Nil Depreciation built in as standard for vehicles under 3 years (75% depreciation waiver for 3-5 years, none beyond 5 years). Separate detailed glass and tyre coverage sections.

coverage.text: [What is NOT covered under glass:] (cid:127) Superficial glass scratches or micro-abrasions that do not constitute a break or chip. (cid:127) Glass damage sustained while the vehicle is in commercial transit not covered under this policy. (cid:127) Tinted film or protective coatings applied to glass after vehicle manufacture.
coverage.heading: What is NOT covered under glass:

coverage.text: SAFEDRIVE ASSURANCE CORPORATION PRIVATE MOTOR VEHICLE OWN DAMAGE POLICY Standalone Own Damage Cover with Nil Depreciation Add-On This policy document sets out the full terms and conditions of the insurance contract between the insured named in the

[We will pay for physical loss or damage to your vehicle caused by:] (cid:127) Physical impact damage caused by collision with another vehicle, animal, or fixed object, resulting in dents to panels, bumpers, or wheel arches. (cid:127) Surface damage including paint and body abrasions arising from collision, intentional acts, or contact with
coverage.heading: We will pay for physical loss or damage to your vehicle caused by:

coverage.text: PART H. GENERAL EXCEPTIONS This policy does not cover any loss arising from: war, nuclear risk, use of vehicle in violation of permit conditions, driving without a valid licence, or use of the vehicle outside the permitted geographical area.
coverage.heading: PART H. GENERAL EXCEPTIONS

coverage.text: [What is NOT covered under glass:] PART A2. TYRE COVERAGE DETAILS Tyre damage is covered subject to a deduction of 50% of the cost of replacement of the damaged tyre and tube. This cover applies only if the vehicle itself has also sustained damage in the same incident. Stand-alone tyre claims
coverage.heading: What is NOT covered under glass:

exclusion_or_condition.text: [The following are excluded from this policy:] 3. Scratch damage resulting from routine washing and cleaning activities of the vehicle, classified under fair wear and tear.
exclusion_or_condition.heading: The following are excluded from this policy:

exclusion_or_condition.text: PART F. NO CLAIM BONUS Claim History NCB at Renewal NCB if Claim Made 0 claims in preceding year 20% 0% 0 claims in preceding 2 years 25% 0% 0 claims in preceding 3 years 35% 0% 0 claims in preceding 4 years 45% 0% 0 claims in preceding 5+ years 50% 0%
exclusion_or_condition.heading: PART F. NO CLAIM BONUS

exclusion_or_condition.text: PART E. DEDUCTIBLE You are responsible for the first Rs. 2,000 of each own damage claim under Part A of this policy. This compulsory excess applies per occurrence. An optional voluntary excess of Rs. 1,000, Rs. 2,000, or Rs. 5,000 may be selected at inception for a premium discount.
exclusion_or_condition.heading: PART E. DEDUCTIBLE

exclusion_or_condition.text: [The following are excluded from this policy:] 2. Panel dents, scratches, or marks arising from gradual accumulation of minor incidents over time where no single identifiable accident can be attributed as the cause.
exclusion_or_condition.heading: The following are excluded from this policy:

exclusion_or_condition.text: [The following are excluded from this policy:] 4. Cracks in engine mountings, chassis members, or structural frame components arising from metal fatigue or prolonged vibration.
